items.raw_desc: Medence játékközpont Intex Dino Park:The fun inflatable centre with slide, water shower and other accessories invites you to play in the garden or even at the swimming pool. The colourful play center is made of vinyl that is durable and will stand up to children's water fun.  A repair patch is available in case of unexpected rupture. The installation of the pool is very simple and quick, just unfold it on a flat, smooth and stable surface, then inflate and fill with water. For convenient draining of the water, the pool is equipped with a drain valve located in the floor. A garden hose can be attached to the slide to give the slide a gradient. The Intex Dino Park pool play centre with a weight capacity of 54 kg is designed for children from 2 years of age. items.raw_desc: LEGO LEGO® Animal Crossing™ 77059 Timmy és Tommy vidám kirándulása:LEGO® Animal Crossing™Timmy and Tommy and a fun day outDecoration with 2 moving figures from Animal Crossing™The LEGO® Animal Crossing™ bricks allow children aged 10 and up to build an authentic video game set. Includes many thematic elements and 2 movable figures. Children can place the Timmy and Tommy figurine on the bridge to fish in the lake, or place them side by side for another adventure. By turning one of the parts of the model, they will move the fish, which will look as if they are swimming in the lake.
